plugins.name: ssh-operator
plugins.description: Operate remote machines via SSH from local Claude Code. Keeps credentials local-only and stabilizes permission patterns via a project-local helper script with token-efficient output limiting.

plugins.name: graphrag-knowledge
plugins.description: プロジェクトの永続知識グラフ(採用判断/却下案/制約/目的/リスク/運用知識)を vault(Obsidian Markdown)を単一正本として安全に読み書きするスキル + CLI。
